studyName: Detroit Research on Cancer Survivors (ROCS) and Disparities and Cancer Epidemiology - Colorectal Cancer (DANCE)

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table reports each subject's self-reported sex, self-reported ethnicity, SEER cancer site, ICD-O-3 histologic tumor type, SEER summary stage at diagnosis, BMI at time of survey, general FACT total, PROMIS anxiety T-score, PROMIS depression T-score, age at survey, education, marital status, employment status, smoking status, current cancer treatment status, household income, vital status at date of last contact, number of months from diagnosis to interview, ICD-O-3 primary cancer site, primary tumor surgery status, family history of same cancer, family history of any cancer, count of comorbidities, radiation therapy status, age at diagnosis, ICD-O-3 tumor behavior, diagnosis year, insurance type, self-reported race, calculated survival time in months, first course surgical treatment, surgical history for cancer, radiation history, and chemotherapy history.

variables.name: AGE_DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Subject age at cancer diagnosis

variables.name: BEHAVIOR_ICDO3
variables.description: Behavior of the tumor reported using ICD-O-3

variables.name: BMI_CURRENT
variables.description: BMI at time of survey (derived using height and current weight)

variables.name: COMORB4COUNT
variables.description: Count of comorbidities, including  high blood pressure, diabetes, COPD/emphysema and cardiovascular disease

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS_YEAR
variables.description: Year of cancer diagnosis

variables.name: EDUCATION
variables.description: Highest level of education completed

variables.name: EMPLOY
variables.description: Employment status at time of survey

variables.name: ETHNICITY
variables.description: Self-reported ethnicity

variables.name: FACTG_TOTAL
variables.description: General FACT (Functional Assessment of Cancer Therapy) total

variables.name: FAMHIST_ANY
variables.description: First degree family history of any cancer

variables.name: FAMHIST_SAME
variables.description: First degree family history of same cancer as subject

variables.name: FIN_INCOME
variables.description: Household income in the last year (before taxes)

variables.name: HISTOLOGY_ICDO3
variables.description: Histologic tumor type using ICD-O-3

variables.name: INSURANCE_TYPE
variables.description: Current insurance

variables.name: INTREAT
variables.description: Currently in treatment for cancer diagnosis

variables.name: MARITAL
variables.description: Current relationship status

variables.name: PRIMARY_SITE
variables.description: Primary site for index cancer (ICD-O-3 site codes)

variables.name: PROMIS_ANX4
variables.description: PROMIS anxiety T-score

variables.name: PROMIS_DEP4
variables.description: PROMIS depression T-score

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Self-reported race

variables.name: SEERSTAGE
variables.description: SEER summary stage at diagnosis

variables.name: SEER_PRIM_SURG
variables.description: Surgery to the primary site performed as part of the first course of treatment

variables.name: SEER_RAD
variables.description: Radiation therapy performed as part of the first course of treatment

variables.name: SEER_SITE_RECODE
variables.description: SEER major cancer site/histology group

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Self-reported sex

variables.name: SMOKE
variables.description: Have you smoked at least 100 cigarettes in your lifetime?

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SURVEYAGE
variables.description: Age at survey

variables.name: SURVIVAL_TIME_MONTHS
variables.description: Survival months, calculated from date of diagnosis to date of last contact

variables.name: TIMETOINT
variables.description: Number of months from diagnosis to interview

variables.name: TX_CHEMO
variables.description: Ever had chemotherapy for your cancer?

variables.name: TX_RAD
variables.description: Ever had radiation for your cancer?

variables.name: TX_SURG
variables.description: Ever had surgery for your cancer?

variables.name: VITAL_STATUS
variables.description: Vital status at date of last contact

tables.description: This sample attributes data table reports each sample's body site of origin, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, and subject's age at collection.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: COLLECTION_AGE
variables.description: Age sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

tables.description: This subject consent data table reports each subject's subject ID, consent, biological sex, and aliases to subject IDs for subjects overlapping other dbGaP studies.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Self-reported sex

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID assigned by public repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Name of public repository for subjects in public repository

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to individual and pooled sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
